description_long: This is a three-story brick apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring a symmetrical facade and regularly spaced arched windows on each floor. The ground floor is clad in a lighter, stone-like material, while the upper floors are finished in reddish-brown brick. The roof is flat and hosts several rooftop elements, including a large billboard advertising 'Creating Cyberpunk', HVAC units, and a fenced-off area. Two prominent black pipes run vertically along one side of the building, and a small entrance is visible at the base. The structure sits on a concrete slab, suggesting an urban sidewalk or street setting. The overall design is utilitarian with subtle classical influences, typical of early 20th-century urban residential architecture.
description: A three-story brick apartment building with arched windows, a flat roof featuring a billboard, and a stone-clad ground floor. The facade is symmetrical and urban, with rooftop utilities and a concrete base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with arched windows, the ground-level entrance, and a large rooftop billboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two tall black pipes running down the building and rooftop utility structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more rooftop equipment and the continuation of the arched window pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite facade with symmetrical windows and the billboard visible on the roof, but no main entrance.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in evenly spaced vertical columns, with each floor featuring a row of arched windows aligned directly above one another.
